evals.description: PostHog test — verifies all validation checks run and status fields present

input.expected_changes: Primary CTA changes from 'Get Started' to 'Start Free Trial'

assertions: Returns valid JSON without a top-level error field
url field matches the input url
tool field matches the input tool
checks object is present and contains tool_script_present, anti_flicker, caching, variant_assignment, and performance fields
Each check has a status field with value 'pass', 'warn', or 'fail'
Each check has a detail or note field explaining the finding
performance object includes pagespeed_score and cls fields
issues array lists any checks that are warn or fail with remediation steps
Output contains no editorial recommendations — issues describes what was found, not strategy

evals.description: Missing anti-flicker snippet — anti_flicker check fails
assertions: checks.anti_flicker.status is 'fail' or 'warn' if anti-flicker snippet is not found in page HTML
overall_status is 'warn' or 'fail' when any check fails
Returns JSON with an error field or with all checks set to null/fail
Does not crash or return empty response
overall_status is 'fail' when the page cannot be fetched
